title: Export all project files with complete source code

requirements.text: Create a downloadable archive containing all project source files with their complete code contents, including backend Motoko files (main.mo, ingredient-store.mo), frontend components, pages, hooks, utilities, configuration files, and documentation files

quotes: give me files individually with all codes

acceptanceCriteria: All backend files (.mo) are included with complete Motoko source code
All frontend files (.tsx, .ts, .css, .html) are included with complete TypeScript/React/CSS code
Configuration files (package.json, tailwind.config.js, dfx.json, etc.) are included
Files maintain their correct directory structure in the archive
Generated archive is downloadable as a single file (ZIP or text-based format)
File contents match the actual deployed codebase exactly

requirements.text: Ensure the existing FileDownloadModal component correctly displays the full file tree and provides download functionality for individual files with their actual source code content, not placeholder content

quotes: give me files individually with all codes

acceptanceCriteria: FileDownloadModal shows complete file tree matching project structure
Individual file downloads contain actual source code from the project
Code syntax and formatting are preserved in downloaded files
File MIME types are correctly set for proper download handling

constraints: Do not modify the backend architecture or Motoko actor structure
Preserve the existing FileDownloadModal component structure and UI
Maintain all existing file paths and directory organization
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or styling of the download interface
Adding version control or Git integration
Modifying any application functionality beyond file export
